description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) and PyTorch versions (1.7.1+cpu, 1.8.1+cpu, 1.9.1+cpu, 1.10.1+cpu) on ubuntu-latest. For each combination, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements-dev.txt and requirements.txt, install PyTorch and the package under test, then run tests with pytest.
